category_sources: source_facts.description says fierce is a DNS reconnaissance tool for locating non-contiguous IP space.

docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README is the primary documentation surface for fierce.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/mschwager/fierce, so repo is returned as null per instruction.

source_facts.executables lists the fierce CLI executable.
